name: Byron Park, Indian Lake
description: Byron Park, Indian Lake is a place to play pickleball in Indian Lake, NY. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include lights.

name: Hamilton County Municipal Courts
description: Hamilton County Municipal Courts is a place to play pickleball in Lake Pleasant, NY. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Indian Lake Central School
description: Indian Lake Central School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Indian Lake, NY. There are 3 indoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and lights.

name: Tennis Courts, Blue Mountain Lake
description: Come play pickleball at Tennis Courts, Blue Mountain Lake in Blue Mountain Lake, NY! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.
